title: Daniel Inverno — Dev Blog
description: Latest dev notes, experiments, and breakdowns.

items.title: Place tiles that fly to the canvas
items.summary: Vibe-coding the celebratory fly-to animation in Stridekeep, the Android measureInWindow Y-offset bug, and the zoom + halo polish on top.

items.title: Tinder-swipe the canvas: building mural gestures
items.summary: One PanResponder, three gesture states, one snap-back hijack fix. Plus the rarity-colour system layered on top.

items.title: When the shipped UI beats the spec
items.summary: Locked mockups vs. real-device review, and the documentation discipline that keeps an AI pair from reverting your divergences.

items.title: Tokens and a formation editor
items.summary: A visual formation editor plugin for Godot, and a token economy where monsters drop golden diamonds that cost upgrade cards.

items.title: Phase-driven game design
items.summary: Each phase is one focused conversation with the AI that ends in a single commit. The naming convention is the methodology, not the bookkeeping.

items.title: Phyllotaxis Generator UE5
items.summary: Playing with parameters to get realistic and natural forms
